metadata.title: Update 5 LinkedIn Projects with HR-Approved Copy
metadata.description: Updates all 5 projects with domain names and professional, outcome-focused descriptions based on HR expert research

reasoning.why: Original project copy was too technical/weird. HR experts recommend outcome-focused, skimmable descriptions showing who benefits and clear impact.
expert_sources: Resume Writing Lab - LinkedIn Projects Guide 2026
Teal HQ - How to Add Projects
Resume Worded - Best Practices for Showcasing Projects
key_changes: Project names use domains (SolaceAgi.com vs SOLACEAGI)
Descriptions focus on WHO benefits (enterprise teams, developers)
Clear IMPACT metrics (91.4% win rate, 4.075x compression)

execution_trace.reasoning: Go to projects page to see all 5 projects

execution_trace.note: Projects visible: IF-THEORY, PHUCNET, PZIP, SOLACEAGI, STILLWATER (may need scroll)

execution_trace.reasoning: Navigate to first project edit (will show most recent)
Update project name to use domain instead of SOLACEAGI

execution_trace.value:
AI decision-making platform serving enterprise teams who need verified, explainable recommendations instead of black-box outputs.

Impact:
• 65,537+ decision templates across finance, healthcare, legal
• 99.3% accuracy on complex reasoning tasks
• Used by teams replacing costly consultant hours

Link: https://solaceagi.com
execution_trace.reasoning: HR-approved copy: who benefits + clear impact + professional tone

execution_trace.value:
Universal compression tool that helps developers, data teams, and researchers reduce file sizes across all formats.

Impact:
• Beats industry standard LZMA on 91.4% of test cases
• 4.075x average compression ratio
• Open-source with commercial support available

Link: https://pzip.com

Compression and persistent intelligence OS designed for teams managing large-scale data pipelines and knowledge bases.

Impact:
• 65537D OMEGA architecture (16-bit Fermat prime design)
• Powers high-throughput data processing
• Reduces storage costs for enterprise workflows

Link: https://stillwater.com
execution_trace.reasoning: HR-approved: enterprise teams + cost reduction focus
Next project (PHUCNET already has domain Phuc.net)

execution_trace.value:
Solo founder ecosystem hub showcasing 5 verified AI products built in public with full transparency.

Impact:
• 100% SWE-bench verified (6/6 industry benchmarks)
• Community-supported via Ko-fi tips
• Harsh QA culture ensures quality over hype

Link: https://phuc.net

Mathematical research advancing prime number theory with applications in cryptography, compression, and distributed systems.

Impact:
• 137 new prime discoveries published
• Fermat primes, Mersenne numbers, Sophie Germain research
• Foundations for deterministic AI architectures

Link: https://iftheory.com

execution_trace.reasoning: Return to profile to verify all updates

next_ai_instructions.verification: Check that all 5 projects show domain names and HR-approved copy
